name: Business Bank Statements
description: Recent business bank statements to help evaluate monthly revenue.

name: Business Tax Returns
description: Annual business tax returns for verifying historical revenue.

name: Profit & Loss (P&L) Statement
description: Financial statement summarizing the revenues, costs, and expenses incurred during a specified period.

name: Balance Sheet
description: A financial statement that reports a company's assets, liabilities, and shareholder equity.

name: Business License or Registration
description: Official documentation proving your business is legally registered.
